# showsCompositionNames()

**Instance Method**

Retrieves whether composition names can be shown in the composition picker view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func showsCompositionNames() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the display of names is enabled; otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Controlling Display of Composition Names

- **setShowsCompositionNames(_:)**: Enables  the display of composition names in the composition picker view.
